title: Add README troubleshooting section
description: README.md is missing a troubleshooting section. Add a section covering: (1) Ollama not starting — check ollama serve, port 11434, (2) Port already in use — EADDRINUSE on 1234, (3) Model download stuck — network/proxy issues, (4) Docker connectivity — OLLAMA_HOST config, (5) Memory issues — model too large for hardware. Keep it concise and practical.
